name: Regression Tests
description: Runs the full test suite against the feature implementation. Identifies failures caused by new code, distinguishes them from pre-existing failures, applies targeted auto-fixes for DTO validation and type issues, and reports any logic failures that require human attention.

checks.prompt: Analyse the feature implementation against the existing test suite. Identify: (1) Tests failing due to new code — classify as DTO_VALIDATION, TYPE_MISMATCH, or LOGIC_ERROR, (2) For DTO_VALIDATION and TYPE_MISMATCH: provide the minimal auto-fix, (3) For LOGIC_ERROR: describe the issue and escalate, (4) New tests needed to cover the new functionality with target coverage %, (5) Overall test suite status: PASS / PASS_WITH_FIXES / FAIL. Apply auto-fixes automatically.
checks.pass: test suite analysis complete — fixes applied
